content.body: Heads up: Stephen Adams from the Dart team will join the "scopes" meeting this Thursday (28th). I had a chat with him before the Amsterdam meeting and they expressed some interest in the "scopes" proposal for the Dart to Js / Dart to Wasm compilers. He has filed some issues on our GitHub since then so i thought it would be great to hear about their use-cases/problems in-person.
